_instructions: Projects shown in the Projects section.
subtitle: Selected work and personal projects

projects.title: AI Training Dataset Pipeline & Monitoring Platform
projects.description: PySpark pipelines on Databricks preprocessing NLP training datasets in S3, Kafka + Spark Structured Streaming for real-time interaction signals, and MLflow-integrated feature engineering for reproducible experiments.

projects.title: Cloud Financial Data Warehouse & Reporting Automation
projects.description: Incremental Airflow + PySpark ETL ingesting financial transactions into cloud warehouses, dimensional schemas in Snowflake and Redshift, and CDC ingestion from PostgreSQL replacing full refreshes.

projects.title: Uber Expenses Tracking
projects.description: End-to-end pipeline analyzing Uber trip and expense data — ingestion, cleaning, and visualization in Python notebooks.

projects.title: Cohort Analysis
projects.description: Customer cohort and retention analysis exploring behavioral patterns over time using Python and visualization libraries.

projects.title: Log Analysis & Anomaly Detection
projects.description: Python pipeline for parsing application logs and surfacing anomalies using statistical and ML-based techniques.

projects.title: Healthcare Data Analysis (Power BI)
projects.description: Power BI dashboards exploring healthcare KPIs — patient outcomes, throughput, and operational metrics.

projects.title: Nursing Home Financial Analysis
projects.description: Financial trend and ratio analysis on nursing home data — building reporting views and surfacing operational insights.
